allow: PowerShell($tools = @\("php","composer","node","npm","mysql"\); foreach \($t in $tools\) { $c = Get-Command $t -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { $ver = & $t --version 2>&1 | Select-Object -First 1; "$t -> $\($c.Source\) :: $ver" } else { "$t -> NOT FOUND" } })

PowerShell($backupDir = ".\\_blueprint_backup"; if \(Test-Path $backupDir\) { Remove-Item $backupDir -Recurse -Force }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path $backupDir | Out-Null; Copy-Item ".\\server\\.env" "$backupDir\\server.env.blueprint" -Force; Copy-Item ".\\server\\README.md" "$backupDir\\server.README.md" -Force; Copy-Item ".\\server\\Dockerfile" "$backupDir\\server.Dockerfile" -Force; Copy-Item ".\\server\\docker-compose.yml" "$backupDir\\server.docker-compose.yml" -Force; Copy-Item ".\\server\\docker" "$backupDir\\server.docker" -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item ".\\server\\resources\\svg" "$backupDir\\server.resources.svg" -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item ".\\server\\resources\\audio" "$backupDir\\server.resources.audio" -Recurse -Force; Get-ChildItem $backupDir -Recurse | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
